title: Device Home Screen - Limited Support Before Launch Date
scenario: Pre-launch device shows "Device support coming soon" pop-up when tapping info icon on Device Home Screen
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Ensure the headset has not yet reached its launch date and the required LM version is installed.
3. Pair and connect the headset to the app. Verify the green connection ring and the "i" icon are visible on the Device Home Screen.
4. Tap the "i" icon on the Device Home Screen.
6. Tap outside the pop-up to dismiss it.
expected: A pop-up message is displayed: \"Device support coming soon. In-app functionality may be limited.\" Tapping outside the pop-up dismisses it.
